metadata.description: Free Claude skills that run your whole reel factory — idea to leads. Feed Claude a viral reel, it studies it, builds you an original in your voice, and turns comments into DM leads. One Content Factory skill runs the whole pipeline; the rest each do one job. By Ootto, the AI autopilot for small business.

plugins.name: claude-content-skills
plugins.description: 10 free Claude skills that run your whole reel factory — idea to leads. Content Factory (the one-command orchestrator) + AI Brain memory, Reel Analyzer, Viral Hook Writer, Reel Scripter, Reel Builder, Caption & Hashtags, Content Repurposer, Content Calendar, and Comment Responder (comment → DM lead loop).
